programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark and Ritchie receive police protection after witnessing a grizzly crime on Halloween night; Fox grows tired of her brother's increasingly delinquent behavior.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark is considering what life would be like as a priest; as rumors of scandal amongst the clergy start to mount, Mark reassesses what his religion means to him.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny tries to get permission to sell the town; David and Alexis spend a night out with the locals.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny tries to have an offensive sign removed; David searches for a job.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira attempt to get to know their children; Alexis believes that Mutt is having an affair with the mayor's wife.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: When Johnny and Moira use the mayor's cabin for the night, Alexis and David throw a party.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate is torn when she receives conflicting information about her client, as she's also roped into a group project with Jenny; Anne guides Sloane on a mission to rediscover their old selves.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: The gang's surprise for Val is derailed when she runs into her ex; in the chaos, Sloane sees a new side of Paul, Anne puts Alice in the hot seat, and Kate goes above and beyond for her client.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate puts the business first as things get personal at a high stakes conference; Anne's trust issues take over when Alice wants to go abroad; Sloane finally unbottles her emotions.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: A Jenny-organized school fun fair brings everybody together for a day of festivities and life-changing decisions.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry comes up with a scheme to catch a basketball game on a school trip to Boston; his plan might fall apart due to Robert coming along as a chaperone.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry develops a crush on an annoying student; Simon gets driving lessons; Trudy and Robert become incomprehensible.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry steps in when Bobbi and Craig break up; Robert disciplines students; Jimmy asks advice on growing wheatgrass.

programme.desc: Mark and Ritchie receive police protection after witnessing a grizzly crime on Halloween night; Fox grows tired of her brother's increasingly delinquent behavior.

programme.desc: Kate puts the business first as things get personal at a high stakes conference; Anne's trust issues take over when Alice wants to go abroad; Sloane finally unbottles her emotions.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: A Jenny-organized school fun fair brings everybody together for a day of festivities and life-changing decisions.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate searches for the magic; Anne learns to let go; Sloane honors her priorities; Jenny course corrects; Val makes amends.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Shannon throws a birthday party for Hamilton East Animal Shelter's oldest cat; Nikki swoops in to save the day when Joy ruins her brand-new work computer.

programme.title: Baroness von Sketch Show
programme.desc: Trapped in an airplane middle seat; only cool babies can come to the party; the Bronte sisters love a bad boy.

programme.title: CBC Winnipeg Comedy Festival
programme.desc: Comics share stories with the host Tommy Chong about neighbours.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa's nerves are tested when Nayoung arrives with a furry friend; Umma shares an uncomfortable lunch with Jung and Shannon; bad timing makes Kimchee neglect a co-worker in need.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa finds marijuana in the house; Shannon throws a staff party that doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Kimchee enjoy an impromptu hangout together; Janet and Umma find an envelope of money in the store; Jung and Shannon struggle to watch TV together.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry's date with Jean McGrory goes well until a gorgeous sex worker bursts in demanding her due; Leung bangs his head against a door and the students post the video online; Trudy regrets her decision.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Sean and Miranda's relationship is on the rocks, and Gerry feels he has to meddle; Robert wants to punish a student; Simon agrees to donate blood.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: When Gerry runs into a distraught Daniel Negreanu, he organizes a staff poker night to help him; things seem to be going well until Wayne Leung ends up winning.
